Converter.subtitle: Convert your X-Rechnung to CSV, TXT, XLSX, or PDF — right in your browser.
Converter.privacy: Your invoice never leaves your browser.
Converter.csvCompatibilityModernHint: For Excel (double-click), Numbers, Google Sheets. RFC 4180 with line breaks inside cells.
Converter.csvCompatibilityLegacyHint: For Power Query 'From Text (Legacy)', DATEV, older importers. Line breaks inside cells are replaced with ' · '.
Converter.errorNotXrechnung: This doesn't look like an X-Rechnung.
Converter.errorTooBig: The file is larger than 10 MB.
Converter.errorGeneric: Unknown error while reading the file.
Converter.warningUnrecognisedVersion: Notice: XRechnung version not fully recognised.

Footer.requirements: Works in all modern browsers. No install, no account, no uploads.

Impressum.title: Legal notice
Impressum.legalForm: Legal form: Besloten Vennootschap (Dutch private limited company)
Impressum.register: Registered in the Dutch commercial register
Impressum.registerAuthority: Register court: Kamer van Koophandel, The Hague
Impressum.odrIntro: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
Impressum.vsbgOptOut: We are neither willing nor obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.

Metadata.title: Plainvoice — X-Rechnung Converter
Metadata.description: Convert X-Rechnung XML to CSV, TXT, XLSX, or PDF — right in your browser. Free, open source, privacy-first.

Bulk.title: Bulk conversion
Bulk.allFailed: None of the files could be read.

ProGate.title: Pro feature
ProGate.body: Bulk conversion is part of Plainvoice Pro — for anyone processing many invoices regularly.
ProGate.availabilityHint: Launching in the coming weeks. No subscription, no recurring fees.

Buy.title: Plainvoice Pro
Buy.subtitle: Convert multiple invoices at once.
Buy.priceCadence: One-time — no subscription, no recurring fees.
Buy.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
Buy.consentLabel: I expressly agree that delivery of the digital content starts immediately after the contract is concluded, and I acknowledge that I thereby lose my right of withdrawal. (See withdrawal notice.)
Buy.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Unlocked.title: Thank you!
Unlocked.body: Your payment was successful. We have just sent your licence key by email. Please also check your spam folder.

Unlock.title: Activate Pro
Unlock.body: Paste your licence key. You received it by email after your purchase.

Errors.xmlSizeLimit: This XML file exceeds the 5 MB per-file limit. Please upload a smaller file.
Errors.xmlEntityDeclarationsForbidden: XML with entity declarations is rejected for security reasons.
